title: ilex prostrata
intro: Ilex prostrata, also known as ground holly or prostrate holly, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Ground holly is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used in herbal remedies and supplements.
